[[Category:Absurdity]]
[[sn:Horror]]Absurdity is the feeling of being unable to understand the universe. It can be a gap that seems unbridgeable, and it can even turn into a feeling of horror. For example, when people see car crashes, they often stare in fascination because they are trying to understand death and whether they will be able to see past the veil of death. However, they will never be able to see past the veil of death, and all they will see is a dead body.<ref>https://evolution.faith/ninefold-vaccine/</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
